canonical_definition: A high-quality, manually annotated benchmark dataset specifically designed for evaluating RAG hallucination detection, covering tasks like question answering, data-to-text writing, and news summarization.
papers: Auto-GDA: Automatic Domain Adaptation for Efficient Grounding Verification in Retrieval-Augmented Generation
ReDeEP: Detecting Hallucination in Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Mechanistic Interpretability
